Class PlayerScore

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Game.Persistence.PlayerScore
public final class PlayerScore extends Object
Immutable per-player score snapshot at match end.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlayerScore(String nickname, int prestigePoints, int food, int endgameBonus, int rank, boolean winner)
    Constructs a PlayerScore snapshot representing a player's final performance.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerScore

      public PlayerScore(String nickname, int prestigePoints, int food, int endgameBonus, int rank, boolean winner)
      Constructs a PlayerScore snapshot representing a player's final performance.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The player's unique nickname.
      prestigePoints - The prestige points scored.
      food - The final remaining food count.
      endgameBonus - The final endgame bonus points.
      rank - The rank of the player (e.g., 1 for winner).
      winner - true if the player is a winner of the match, false otherwise.

  • Method Details

      Returns the player's nickname.

      public int prestigePoints()
      Returns the prestige points scored.

      public int food()
      Returns the final food count.

    • endgameBonus

      public int endgameBonus()
      Returns the final endgame bonus points.
      Returns:
      The endgame bonus.

    • rank

      public int rank()
      Returns the rank of the player in the match.
      Returns:
      The player's rank.

    • winner

      public boolean winner()
      Checks if the player won the match.
      Returns:
      true if the player is a winner, false otherwise.
